channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Stripe’s $53 billion PayPal bid is a high-stakes play to own the future of digital payments
item.description: If Stripe acquires PayPal, the real prize could be consumer wallets, stablecoin issuance or the infrastructure powering the next generation of digital payments.

item.title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
item.description: Eligible E*TRADE retail clients can now buy, sell and hold Bitcoin, Ether and Solana through a partnership with crypto infrastructure provider Zero Hash.

item.title: Tradable’s $1B Stellar deal adds to institutional tokenization boom
item.description: Tradable will bring up to $1 billion in private credit assets to Stellar, extending the blockchain’s push into institutional finance and tokenized real-world assets.

item.title: Visa backs Open USD with new stablecoin platform as Circle faces fresh competition
item.description: Visa launched a stablecoin platform that lets banks and fintechs issue, manage and settle digital dollars through its payments network.

item.title: Dormant Bitcoin Whale Moves $383 Million After More Than 8 Years
item.description: The wallet holding nearly 5,908 BTC since 2017 transferred its entire balance to a new address.

item.title: Keyrock acquires BlockFills trading assets to expand institutional crypto business
item.description: The deal adds institutional trading clients, derivatives expertise and regulatory licenses as Keyrock looks to deepen its presence in crypto capital markets.

item.title: The Clarity Act is the most important consumer protection effort in years
item.description: Consumers should not have to wait for another crisis to get the protections they deserve, argues Summer Mersinger, CEO of the Blockchain Association.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Strengthening defenses against AI fraud
item.description: Strengthening defenses against AI fraud

item.title: 🔥 TODAY: T. Rowe Price has launched its Active Crypto ETF ($TKNZ), offering exposure to $BTC, $ETH, $XRP, $SOL, and $HYPE. “Bringing crypto to Boomers since 2026.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBYajJmZTV4REVtVDczdk9YWndRQ1YzbVZFYnRxN0pES21nSk5paUhmZHdra0R1UVBlbTZ5UzMyTC0wNUx2VWhWaEpHVk9VdjBBZE13bFZsSXQ5R0xMYk16ZTNWZlU?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 TODAY: T. Rowe Price has lau…

item.title: Crypto brokerage firm Alpaca raises $135 million for tokenized stock infrastructure
item.description: The company has previously cleared or held in custody roughly 94% of tokenized U.S. equities and now holds over $1.5 billion in underlying stocks.

item.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
item.description: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

item.title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
item.description: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

item.title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
item.description: Prediction markets reached a record $113.8 billion in notional volume in Q2 as spot CEX trading, derivatives volume and stablecoin market cap declined.

item.title: Ledger wants AI agents to manage crypto without holding your keys
item.description: AI agents can read wallet balances and analyze portfolios but requires every sensitive action to be approved on a Ledger hardware device before it can be executed.

item.title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
item.description: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.

item.title: Status update: I am moving from the Ethereum Foundation to Ethlabs @ethlabs_org, joining the team to accelerate protocol work in the age of Ethereum adoption. In 5 years at EF Research, I have worked on research and specification of a wide range of Protoc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5DeEg0MGdjbm9nOWRISnN6X2Z2MzJESFR0QXhrUzNLRHZlTklVVzctejItREpHZGY5bFBBSEQwNTdvVHFMUWNmSFluTFJXdXJ6ejQyZ3ZyRV9Vdnhy?oc=5" target="_blank">Status update: I am moving from the Ethere…

item.title: $63,873.31 #Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: $63,873.31 #Bitcoin

item.title: We are in the final stages of completing the Coinme acquisition, which will involve integrating that team into Polygon Labs, a move that will grow our organization as part of a broader merger exercise to position Polygon Labs to be profitable in 2027. As part of t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBOTGRfXzBtMkk0cmxWRXJSUGgwYkRzWEJEd0F0QW50cURoeExLcUVNRDlCcnJ3cGZGbDJ3LWVfMXlVbTM2bC1yTDJqODd3cnc2V1hISGNiS1VWUGot?oc=5" target="_blank">We are in the final stages of completing t…

item.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
item.description: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.

item.title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
item.description: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.

item.title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
item.description: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.

item.title: Galaxy targets institutional stablecoin yield with new DeFi vaults
item.description: The crypto financial services firm launched Galaxy Curator, a Morpho-based platform that gives Fireblocks' 2,400 institutional clients access to onchain yield strategies.

item.title: ARK pushes back against a16z’s ‘TradFi wants blockchain, not DeFi’ claim
item.description: ARK Invest’s director of research disputed a16z crypto’s thesis that traditional finance will adopt permissioned blockchain infrastructure instead of decentralized finance, saying institutions will increasingly rely on DeFi rails.

item.title: The most popular bitcoin call option has slipped by $10,000
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 18, 2026

item.title: Inside the high-stakes race to build an open financial system specifically for AI bots
item.description: The newly-convened x402 Foundation is a neutral space where competitors and payment methods can work together to create an open standard for AI agentic commerce.

item.title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
item.description: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $64,000 after hitting monthly high as bears take control
item.description: Profit-taking after bitcoin hit a $65,500 monthly high combined with fresh Iranian strikes on U.S. bases sent crypto lower, with bears leading price action across most tokens.

item.title: Autonomous AI agent economy faces infrastructure gaps: Visa, Artemis
item.description: Visa and Artemis found that infrastructure bottlenecks are preventing broader commercial adoption of the autonomous AI agent economy.

item.title: Tether invests $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá as it expands Latin America push
item.description: Ualá’s CEO clarified Tether is acting solely as a financial investor, citing current regional regulations preventing any immediate USDT integration.

item.title: U.S. adds four Iran central bank crypto wallets to sanctions, Tether freezes $131 million of contents
item.description: The freeze targets TRON-based addresses that held over $165 million, preventing those specific funds from being transferred or redeemed.

item.title: US Senate unanimously adopts resolution opposing clemency for SBF
item.description: The Senate approved a resolution opposing clemency for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried as prediction markets put the odds of a Trump pardon by July 31 below 1%.

item.title: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
item.description: The nonbinding resolution said the disgraced FTX founder should 'under no circumstances' receive clemency.

item.title: Tether invests $20M into Argentine neobank Ualá
item.description: Tether reportedly invested $20 million into Ualá, as part of the Argentine neobank’s $197 million funding round announced earlier in March.

item.title: Bitcoin $107K buyers providing ‘early signals’ of 2026 bear-market bottom: Glassnode
item.description: Bitcoin realized losses appeared to be copying a reversal structure that marked previous bear-market bottoms, with $69,000 a new BTC price battleground.

item.title: Robinhood Chain memecoin launchpad Vlad.fun halts after ‘internal integrity’ issue
item.description: Vlad.fun suspended its platform after discovering a “serious internal integrity issue” involving members of its team, without disclosing the nature of the alleged misconduct.

item.title: AI is great, but it does not protect you against inflation. Bitcoin does. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5ud0lwdHpJMjlKYjJ0QWxjVTBtSE9aQnQwUDRZeG1nMHB1ZTBsY01adFUtQ09wR21pM3ZZTTJiNzhwb0NTNUlCcVJ2cDF1RDJDUzBYRDU1X3I5UEtnWEpkcw?oc=5" target="_blank">AI is great, but it does not protect…

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Tomorrow could decide the ENTIRE future of crypto in the United States. The House is holding a field hearing on the CLARITY Act: "Building the Future of Finance: How the CLARITY Act Unlocks Innovation." Turn on notifications for updates. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBzOVU3U3JLVVFlYnVMU3d2S3YwanQ0UVJ0WkVuN2JnbFpIVnJjNHBPMk1OVFRqWlF2b1l2aVhUUUNaalF1Ul9ESS1Td1BJbWZUdk9zbDNXejlBRjBIS2IxaVZn?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Tomorrow could deci…

item.title: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
item.description: The deal gives Hyperion an equity stake in Skew and a share of listing-service revenue as it expands the utility of its HYPE treasury assets.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin holding $64,000 as AI momentum stocks continue to tumble
item.description: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT came down heavily on hardware wallets. BTC traded steady near $65,000 after South Korea's rate hike.

item.title: U.S. Senate unanimously opposes clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried
item.description: The nonbinding resolution passed without objection after Bankman-Fried asked for clemency, months after Trump pardoned other major crypto figures, including Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: A bitcoin wallet dormant since the 2017 peak just moved $383 million
item.description: The coins went to a fresh address rather than an exchange, so nothing has been sold yet.

item.title: Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund
item.description: This is not a broad rally as bitcoin is up 4% over the same stretch, and solana, TRON and hyperliquid are all lower.

item.title: Trump to meet with senators over CLARITY Act on Thursday: Politico
item.description: US President Donald Trump is set to meet with several senators on Thursday as negotiators race to get the CLARITY Act across the line before the Senate’s August recess.

item.title: Two groups of crypto investors are selling bitcoin to cap its latest price recovery
item.description: Bitcoin surges toward $65,000 on softer-than-expected inflation data, but on-chain signals show two key investor groups selling into the bounce.

item.title: Study Finds Signs of Manipulation in Bitcoin Bets on World’s Largest Prediction Market Researchers from Stanford University and Singapore Management University found signs of settlement manipulation in Polymarket’s popular five-minute Bitcoin prediction - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9sZllDMGQtQzYtZlVDS3JJR2hZYzFOeTZYQXhlRklwbnlBUWFaa0NhZEoxUm1SZG5xLXhiRVgtMy1vWGd4VGY0WmNnNmpDalNHZTlEVjgtcFhyTjhQWDJLWExWdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Study Finds Signs of Manipulatio…

item.title: NYDIG: Bitcoin Could Bottom Near $38,000–$39,000 If Past Bear Markets Repeat NYDIG said Bitcoin’s 2025–2026 drawdown is increasingly resembling the four-year cycle corrections seen in 2014, 2018 and 2022. If the current decline follows the depth and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1oeVQwZW5oZy1oZy1yWEJ5TnVpaHJHanA1XzY4clVYMzNXMGZNTktDTnFiNG5hRWtYZmsydzJrMTdwQW5MWGo0RkhSRm52U2RqUFVrY2YyYnlyS0VKalBweVBIWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">NYDIG: Bitcoin Could Bottom Near…

item.title: Base’s social bet left it trailing in prediction markets and perps: Pollak
item.description: Base creator Jesse Pollak is stepping back from leadership of the Base App after admitting he was “definitively wrong” to bet on social experiences driving crypto adoption.

item.title: OFAC Sanctions Iran Central Bank Crypto Wallets, Freezing $131M in Stablecoins
item.description: The U.S. Treasury Department’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) on Tuesday updated its Central Bank of Iran designation to… The post OFAC Sanctions Iran Central Bank Crypto Wallets, Freezing $131M in Stablecoins appeared first on Ch…

item.title: Why Analysts Aren’t Worried About Coinbase’s 30% Drop
item.description: William Blair slashed earnings estimates by 34% and held its Outperform call. But analysts think Bitcoin's chart may already be answering the bigger question.

item.title: OpenAI Uses AI Red Team to Strengthen GPT-5.6 Against Prompt Injection Attacks
item.description: OpenAI said its new automated red-teaming model, GPT-Red, uncovered vulnerabilities that were used to make GPT-5.6 more resistant to prompt injection attacks.

item.title: Coinbase's Jesse Pollak steps back from Base app leadership after admitting his crypto social strategy failed
item.description: Pollak said that Jordan Fish, also known on X as 'Cobie,' will lead the Base app team.

item.title: Stanford study says 5-minute Bitcoin prediction markets enable settlement manipulation
item.description: Researchers found that Polymarket’s five-minute Bitcoin prediction markets create incentives to manipulate spot prices around contract settlement, proposing longer settlement windows as a potential fix.

item.title: Meet Bonsai: The First 27B AI Model That Fits on Your Phone
item.description: PrismML's Bonsai 27B runs full reasoning AI on an iPhone for free. We tested it, and it's as impressive as it sounds.

item.title: What Is BIP-110 and Why Is It Dividing the Bitcoin Community?
item.description: A proposal to restrict non-financial data on Bitcoin has split prominent developers, miners, and industry leaders ahead of a key activation deadline, reopening one of the network's biggest governance debates since the Blocksize Wars.

item.title: Revolut receives in-principle approval from UAE authorities for crypto services
item.description: Dubai’s Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority approved the London-headquartered fintech company for broker-dealer, management and investment, and exchange services in the UAE.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Lyn Alden's 'ORANGE JUICE' Raises $40 million to launch a permanent capital holding company backed by a BTC treasury 👀 "It’s a company that acquires, improves, and permanently holds cash-flowing businesses, backed by a bitcoin treasury" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE03YXhMb3kwRXp3aVRQUjZxOUdiU2lKckZZRTVTU1M1UkpYQVBiWFBna0pTQlpJNm9lUlVaMXVQdUtrSkFnbGVmNEhHc2J3TjdaeGgtZDI4TFozZHkxYm1kYTF2bldjUnc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Lyn Alden's '…

item.title: Base Creator Jesse Pollak Steps Back From App Leadership After Admitting Social Bet 'Was Wrong'
item.description: Pollak said he is handing the Base App back to Coinbase to focus on building Base into "the blockchain for global finance" after conceding the network's push into on-chain social missed the mark.

item.title: Voting no on the Clarity Act isn't being against the crypto industry - it’s anti-consumer. It's a vote to leave crypto holders exposed to bad actors playing regulatory arbitrage. The bipartisan Clarity Act is now advancing towards a vote on the Senate floor, and it is a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9wU1h0MjRoU2RyQkRVTk5GOHRFeVpXMFFQaHAyQ2hrU0RuZ2UxeVFubUlGRWdLOHVCRGRWek5Ia1NIWjJZYTRwQnpYeXFjenNmd3NIRjI2TndfSWJsSzNSc2ZxOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Voting no on the Clarity Act isn…

item.title: Of course bitcoin can still drop below realized price ($53k), like it did in every bear market bottom. But Oct $126k top was not the cycle top IMO. Based on stock-to-flow valuation, BTC could still go to $500k ($250k - $1m range) .. this cycle (2026-2028! Patience - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9rV2JobERtU0k4ampyazNUREtDS2M2ZkF3bnBaclRWR2RmSHUzR3VxdlVqRkRGWEN2QnZzbW9OWWNTNERkSlFKejN5ZndkSmswVnFFWWdadmRZTHZjd2YzYXVsZ3g5Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Of course bitcoin can still …
